{
  "schemaVersion": 1,
  "kind": "chain-poem-weaver-deploy-target-readiness",

  "ok": true,
  "origin": "https://chain-poem-weaver.vercel.app",
  "domain": "chain-poem-weaver.vercel.app",
  "env": {
    "MINIAPP_ORIGIN": true,
    "FARCASTER_ACCOUNT_ASSOCIATION_HEADER": true,
    "FARCASTER_ACCOUNT_ASSOCIATION_PAYLOAD": true,
    "FARCASTER_ACCOUNT_ASSOCIATION_SIGNATURE": true,
    "CHAIN_POEM_PROVENANCE_SECRET": false,

    "CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN": false,
    "NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN": false
  },
  "tools": {
    "npx": true,
    "vercel": false,
    "wrangler": false,
    "netlify": false
  },
  "providers": [
    {
      "id": "vercel",
      "serverCapableForCurrentApi": true,
      "cliPresent": true,
      "tokenPresent": true,
      "ready": true,
      "deployCommand": "npx vercel@latest deploy --prod --token %VERCEL_TOKEN%",
      "note": "Best current fit for api/*.mjs serverless routes and /poem rewrite. npx is enough when a token is configured."
    },
    {
      "id": "cloudflare-pages",
      "serverCapableForCurrentApi": false,
      "cliPresent": false,
      "tokenPresent": false,
      "ready": false,
      "deployCommand": "wrangler pages deploy dist",
      "note": "Static Pages alone will not run current Node-style api/*.mjs routes without a Pages Functions adapter."
    },
    {
      "id": "netlify",
      "serverCapableForCurrentApi": false,
      "cliPresent": false,
      "tokenPresent": false,
      "ready": false,
      "deployCommand": "netlify deploy --prod --dir dist",
      "note": "Needs function adapter before current api/*.mjs routes are live."
    }
  ],
  "preferredProvider": "vercel",
  "blockers": [],
  "warnings": [
    "account_association_shape_only_not_cryptographic_verification",
    "chain_poem_provenance_secret_missing_unsigned_preview_only"
  ],
  "next": "Build production dist and deploy with npx vercel@latest deploy --prod --token %VERCEL_TOKEN%."
}
